title: Bazi Life Dossier Infographic AI
sourceTitle: Bazi Life Dossier Infographic AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Tall vertical bazi life-dossier infographic generated from fictional birth-date and bazi profile provided by the user, focused on full life-dossier infographic with destiny timeline and five-element analysis as symbolic entertainment data visualization. Subject: Chinese classical infographic labels supplies the swappable label language detail for this template. The user-provided symbolic bazi profile becomes a complete destiny dossier, with four-pillar structure, five-element balance, life-cycle timeline, scoring system, and classical judgement text organized through four pillars, day-master strength, five-element ratio, pattern type, useful elements, luck cycles, radar scores, poetic judgement. Scene: High-end metaphysics paper dossier on rice-paper beige background with bronze-gold structure, ink-black Chinese text, dark radar-chart focal panel, five-element color chips, refined dividers, and dense but readable infographic blocks. Composition: Fixed tall 1400x2200-style vertical layout: centered top title, subtitle bar with day master, pattern, and main element, five-element chips, four-line poetic judgement, eight-dimension radar chart with score bars, five-element energy distribution block, full 0-90 life timeline, major life-node markers, zodiac-year markers, and bottom generation-date footer. Signature Elements: full life-dossier infographic with destiny timeline and five-element analysis, four pillars, day-master strength, five-element ratio, pattern type, useful elements, luck cycles, radar scores, poetic judgement, top命运人生档案 header, dark eight-dimension radar chart, gold score bars, five-element distribution columns, 0-90 full luck timeline, highlighted current cycle, life-node arrows, zodiac-year diamonds, and a classical four-line judgement with plain-language note. Style: Premium Chinese bazi consultant dossier meets modern data visualization, with traditional metaphysics authority, precise chart language, high information density, clean grid hierarchy, refined paper texture, and professional printable-report finish. Color Palette: Rice-paper beige and warm xuan-paper white base, ink black text, antique bronze-gold as the main accent, deep navy radar panel, subtle dark red warning accents, and controlled five-element color markers for wood, fire, earth, metal, and water. Lighting: Flat premium document lighting with subtle paper grain, soft panel shadows, gentle gold highlights, and strong contrast on the dark radar-chart module. Materials: Xuan-paper texture, printed cardstock panels, bronze-gold rules, ink typography, dark chart substrate, fine dividers, small symbolic icons, and clean infographic cards. Typography: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。
